global_description: A small, compact bird with a short, rounded body and a relatively large head. It has a grayish-olive upper body and pale underparts. The wings and tail are short, and the beak is small and pointed.

part_details.head: Large relative to body, grayish-olive with a small pointed beak.
part_details.body: Compact and rounded, grayish-olive on top, pale underneath.
part_details.wings: Short and rounded, matching the upper body color.
part_details.beak: Small, pointed, suitable for catching insects.

spatial_relations: The large head is positioned at the front of the compact body.
The short wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The short tail extends from the rear of the body.
